pi_items.verified_value: Explosive, blasting, type B or Agent blasting, Type B
pi_items.source: CAMEO Chemicals proper shipping name for UN 0331

privileged_info_summary: All five UN explosive numbers with their DOT hazard classes and compatibility groups are accurate and verifiable from the CAMEO Chemicals public database (maintained by NOAA): UN 0029 (Detonators, non-electric) classified as 1.1B, UN 0065 (Cord, detonating) as 1.1D, UN 0241 (Explosive, blasting, type E) as 1.1D, UN 0456 (Detonators, electric) as 1.4S, and UN 0331 (Explosive, blasting, type B) as 1.5D. All hazard classes and compatibility group letters are correctly extracted from the classification system.
